qa_pairs.question: Which molecules have a label of - and contain atoms with the element sn?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'sn' AND molecule.label = '-'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which molecule entities with label equal to '-', having at least one related atom record (linked on molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id) with element equal to 'sn'?
